examples: The dusk light was failing and the interior of the pickup was dark but she knew the occupant was staring at her.
There was no post except the usual junk addressed to the occupant.
There was no mail except the usual junk addressed to the occupant.
His semi-detached house still stands in leafy Menlove Avenue with a blue plaque advertising its famous former occupant.
Specially reinforced safe rooms provide "near absolute occupant protection from even the worst-case tornado, " he said.
